Primary instructions are maintained in AGENTS.md.
Always apply rules from the root /AGENTS.md file and the module-level AGENTS.md file (e.g., /src/ui/AGENTS.md, /src/orchestrator/AGENTS.md, /src/control-plane/AGENTS.md, /src/runtime/AGENTS.md) relevant to the files being edited. Refer to these files to avoid common platform and framework traps.
